finraSections.title: Trading, Customer Accounts and Prohibited Activities

chapters.title: Regulatory Entities, Agencies & Market Participants
chapters.summary: The SEC, FINRA, other SROs, the Fed, SIPC, FDIC, and the roles of broker-dealers, investment advisers, market makers, custodians, and transfer agents.

chapters.title: Market Structure
chapters.summary: Primary, secondary, third, and fourth markets; exchanges vs OTC; dark pools.

sections.title: Third & Fourth Markets and Dark Pools

chapters.title: Economic Factors
chapters.summary: Monetary vs fiscal policy, the business cycle, interest rates, yield curves, and currency effects.

chapters.title: Offerings
chapters.summary: IPOs, secondary offerings, Reg D private placements, Rule 144, shelf registration, and underwriting roles.

sections.title: Exempt Offerings: Reg D and Rule 144

chapters.title: Equity Securities
chapters.summary: Common and preferred stock, rights, warrants, ADRs, dividends, and splits.

chapters.title: Debt Instruments
chapters.summary: Treasuries, municipal GO vs revenue bonds, corporates, and bond math: price/yield, accrued interest, call features.

chapters.title: Packaged Products
chapters.summary: Mutual funds, closed-end funds, ETFs, UITs, REITs, variable annuities, share classes and fees.

chapters.title: Options
chapters.summary: Calls and puts, buyer/seller rights and obligations, basic strategies, and hedging.

chapters.title: Other Products
chapters.summary: Municipal fund securities/529s, DPPs, hedge funds, and structured products.

chapters.title: Investment Risks
chapters.summary: Market, credit, inflation, liquidity, political, currency, reinvestment, capital, and concentration risk.

sections.title: Systematic Risks: Market, Interest Rate & Inflation

chapters.title: Trading
chapters.summary: Order types, bid/ask, T+1 settlement, corporate actions, and trade capacity: agency vs principal.

chapters.title: Customer Accounts
chapters.summary: Account types, cash vs margin, Reg T basics, KYC/suitability, UGMA/UTMA, retirement accounts and tax treatment.

sections.title: Cash vs Margin Accounts & Reg T

chapters.title: Prohibited Activities
chapters.summary: Insider trading, market manipulation, front running, churning, selling away, AML/BSA, SARs, and CTRs.

chapters.title: Regulatory Framework
chapters.summary: Securities Acts of 1933/1934, registration and CE requirements, U4/U5, statutory disqualification, communications rules, and Reg BI.
